role: Core contracts and runtime orchestration module for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides foundational type definitions, configuration validation schemas, error code constants, pipeline execution orchestrator, scanning policy contracts, task state factories and mutators, and dependency injection context types that collectively define the structural and behavioral backbone of the ArchSpine task processing pipeline.

children.role: Core configuration validation module providing runtime predicates for the SpineConfig schema.
Core infrastructure module providing centralized error code constants and error option type definitions for the ArchSpine system.
Core runtime orchestrator for executing SpineTask instances with lifecycle management and performance telemetry.
Core TypeScript type definition module establishing the scanning policy configuration contract for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Core pipeline state factory and mutation module providing initialization functions and runtime state management for the ArchSpine task execution pipeline.
Core TypeScript contract definitions for ArchSpine pipeline task state, metrics, and stage boundaries.
Core interface defining the dependency injection context for ArchSpine task execution.
